## Release Category

<!-- Add the matching PR label so release notes are grouped correctly. -->

- [ ] `type: feature` - New user-facing capability
- [ ] `type: fix` - Bug fix or broken behavior
- [ ] `type: ux` - UX, copy, or visual polish
- [ ] `type: docs` - Documentation-only change
- [ ] `type: infra` - CI, deployment, dependencies, or tooling
- [ ] `no-release-note` - Internal-only change that should be omitted
